title: The Andhra Pradesh and Mysore (Transfer of Territory) Act, 1968
full_text: The Andhra Pradesh and Mysore (Transfer of Territory) Act, 1968 आन्‍ध्र प्रदेश और मैसूर (राज्‍यक्षेत्र अन्‍तरण) अधिनियम,1968 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196836 Act Number: 36 Enactment Date: 1968-08-22 Act Year: 1968 Short Title: The Andhra Pradesh and Mysore (Transfer of Territory) Act, 1968 Hindi Title: आन्‍ध्र प्रदेश और मैसूर (राज्‍यक्षेत्र अन्‍तरण) अधिनियम,1968 Long Title: An Act to provide for the transfer of certain territory from the State of Mysore to the State of Andhra Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 22-08-1968 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Andhra Pradesh and Mysore (Transfer of Territory) Act, 1968 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Transfer of territory from Mysore to Andhra Pradesh. Section 4. Amendment of First Schedule to the Constitution. Section 5. Extent of parliamentary and assembly Constituencies. Section 6. Provision as to sitting members of Parliament and Legislative Assemblies. Section 7. Extent of Council Constituencies. Section 8. Sitting Members of Legislative Councils. Section 9. Extension of jurisdiction of Andhra Pradesh High Court. Section 10. Appropriation of moneys for expenditure in transferred territory under existing Appropriation Acts. Section 11. Assets and liabilities. Section 12. State Financial Corporations and State Electricity Boards. Section 13. Extension of laws. Section 14. Power to construe laws. Section 15. Legal proceedings. Section 16. Transfer of pending proceedings. Section 17. Effect of provisions inconsistent with other laws. Section 18. Power to remove difficulties. Section 19. Power to make rules. Schedule 1.
